base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of elder_wizard_walk — a character from 1986 dragon quest. Gray-robed elder — 4-dir × 2-frame walk. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Gray-robed elder — 4-dir × 2-frame walk; possibly the Old Man at Rimuldar teaching Outside/Radiant spells
